feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: CK2027 Error When Marking Standard Cost Estimates in F1865 - How to Resolve "Marking Not Allowed for
entry.content:
## CK2027 Error When Marking Standard Cost Estimates in F1865 - How to Resolve "Marking Not Allowed for Period 002/2026"?

---

### Issue Description

**Error Message:** CK2027
**Error Text:**
> "In Legal Valuation the following occurred: You are trying to mark materials for period 002/2026 and company code 1510 in ledger 0L, although marking has not been allowed for this."

**System:** SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
**App Used:** F1865 - Manage Costing Runs - Estimated Costs
**Step Failed:** Marking step in costing run execution

When I try to execute the **Marking** step in my costing run, I receive error CK2027 stating that marking is not allowed for period 002/2026 in company code 1510, ledger 0L.

---

### Questions

1. **How can I resolve this CK2027 error?** What are the exact step-by-step instructions to fix this issue in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

2. **Which Fiori App(s) do I need to use** to allow marking for:
- Company Code: 1510
- Ledger: 0L
- Period: 002/2026
- Valuation Type: Legal Valuation

3. **What specific settings or configurations need to be changed** to enable marking permission for this period?

---

### What I've Tried

- Searched for apps with keywords "Organizational Standards" and "Organizational Measure" but couldn't find the right app
- The error message mentions "organizational measure" but I don't know which app to use in Cloud Public Edition

---

### Environment

- SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
- Release: [your release version]
- Scope Item: Standard Costing (BEG_JP or 3F0)

---

Any help would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Develop custom report in SAP S/4 HANA public cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am currently working with SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Version 2602.0.59 and would like to develop a custom report within the system. Could you please guide me on the required steps to achieve this?

Any insights, best practices, or resources on how to approach this task in SAP S/4HANA Cloud would be greatly appreciated.

Looking forward to your responses!

Best regards,
Harshita

entry.title: Bank Statement Item Not Marked as Completed After Automatic Clearing
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

When I perform an automatic clearing of a payment, the system correctly links the operation to the corresponding bank statement item. Up to this point everything works as expected. However, when I later check that bank statement item, the line still appears as “Not Completed”, even though the clearing has been successfully executed.

In order for the item to be marked as completed, I have to manually change the status within the bank statement itself, which does not seem consistent with a fully automated process.

My questions are:

  • Is there any standard way for the system to automatically update the status of the bank statement item once the automatic clearing has been executed?

  • Is there any additional configuration for the item to be marked as completed without manual intervention?

  • Is this behavior a standard limitation in SAP Public Cloud when the clearing is performed outside the bank statement processing flow?

I appreciate any guidance or experiences you can share.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: GSTR6 - Not able to submit the report in "Run Statutory Reports" app
entry.content:
GSTR6 - Not able to submit the report in "Run Statutory Reports" app


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: Output Determination Management - Send out 2 emails with different templates
entry.content:
Hello,

We are implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2602. Our customer sends out a Purchase Order document via email for every Purchase Order that is being created. That works. But there is another requirement: When the Purchasing Organization is PO10, there should be 2 emails send out to the Contact Person (CP). The first email should be the standard Purchase Order template, the second email should be a Shipping Label that is also sent by email. Our developer has already created the Form Template for the Shipping Label.

This is our current configuration in teh Output Parameter Determination app: 

 

So in short: When Purchasing Organization = PO10 --> Send 2 emails to the Contact Person (CP). Email 1: Purchase Order. Email 2: Shipping Label.

Can someone support with this question, is this possible in Cloud Publid Edition and how should we configure this? Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Product Hierarchy Analysis Report in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Subject: Product Hierarchy Analysis Report in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
Body:
Hello SAP Community,
I'm working on an S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition implementation and need to provide sales analysis capabilities based on Product Hierarchy.
Requirements:

Analyze sales revenue/volume by Product Hierarchy levels
Ideally a standard Fiori app or analytical report
Able to drill down through hierarchy levels

Questions:

Is there a standard Fiori analytical app that supports Product Hierarchy as a key dimension for sales analysis?
If not available in standard, what would be the recommended approach?

Custom CDS view?
Embedded Analytics?
SAC integration?

 

Environment:

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (version: XXXX)
Scope items activated: Sales Order Processing (BD6), Product Master (J58), etc.

I've checked F0701 (Sales Volume Analysis) and F0707 (Sales Analysis), but couldn't find Product Hierarchy as a standard dimension in these apps.
Any guidance would be greatly appreciated!
Best regards

entry.title: "How to Get Started with SAP Business AI on S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition – Looking for a Beginner's
entry.content:
Hello everyone. I would like to ask for your advice regarding the setup of SAP Business AI.

I apologize for asking with very limited knowledge, but I would be truly grateful if I could get help from this wonderful community.

■ Current Situation
- I work at an SAP Partner company, and we have SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition deployed in our own environment.
- We have a BTP subaccount, but nothing has been configured beyond SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition itself.
- Through various seminars, I learned about the great potential of SAP Business AI and would like to start by building it in our own environment.

■ Goals
① Build an environment where SAP Business AI can run in our own system
② If possible, try running a free (no additional cost) AI scenario first
(e.g., Sales Order Automatic Completion)

■ Questions
① When starting with SAP Business AI in an S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition environment, what should be the very first step?
② Could you point me to any beginner-friendly roadmaps, official documentation, or learning materials?
③ For free AI scenarios, what is the minimum required configuration on the BTP side?

I have searched through SAP Community posts and also tried asking generative AI tools, but I have not been able to find concrete steps that fit my specific environment.

If anyone with experience could share their advice, it would be a tremendous help.
Thank you very much in advance.

SAP Business AI SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Service Joule

entry.title: Request Support: Incoterms Field Mandatory in PO
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We would like to make the Incoterms field mandatory in the Purchase Order (PO) screen. I have reviewed the standard configurations, including all available screen layout controls for Purchasing documents, but I could not find any option to control "Screen layout at document level" the Incoterms field as mandatory.

 Could you please advise on the correct configuration or enhancement approach to achieve this? 
Please guide us on the recommended solution.

Thank you.
Regards,
Manjunath Terdal

entry.title: Batch Management in advanced intercompany process
entry.content: I have a material for which i am using Advanced intercompany scenario. This material is batch managed in delivering plant and not batch managed in the transit plant. Now i have created an initial sales order with no batch in the receiving company and purchase order gets created automatically in the same company. In the delivering company the subsequent sales order gets created automatically. I create the outbound delivery with reference to the sales order from the receiving company with manually entering the batch. I post the goods issue against this outbound delivery. After posting goods issue the goods receipt against the purchase order (GRTS) is posted automatically successfully without batch. Now when the system tries to post the material document Post GI from Storage Location (GIFS) automatically an error gets created. The error text is as follows - "Check table XMCHA: entry does not exist". I don't want to activate batch management in the transit plant. (Restriction of advanced intercompany process are known) How can i overcome this issue? Is there any customizing that will help?

entry.title: How to send dunning letters to customer Standard E-Mail address
entry.content:
Hello,

Could you please let us us know, how we can ensure that, dunning notices will be sent out to the respective customers standard email address? 

After our colleagues started to create a dunning notice, the email is not being sent out to the standard email address of the Business Partner. 

The dunning procedure has been maintained. The notice was also successfully executed in SAP, but without the customer being notified. The email is only sent if an email address is maintained at Clerks Internet address. 

According to the SAP Online Help, the default email address should be actually used in case Clerks Internet address is blank.

Which setting is necessary to avoid Clerks Internet address ? It also does not seem to make a difference, if standard communication method is E-Mail

I found this, SAP Help Portal which is pretty much how it is configurated in our SAP right now. 

Many thanks 

Best regards, 

Christoph

entry.title: Unable to edit validity periods for tax code
entry.content:
We  tried to edit the validity period in configuration activity Configuration Activity 101016 "Define Tax Codes for Sales and Purchases" (Finance > Statutory Reporting > Tax).

But we are unable to edit the validity periods. Kindly review and advise. 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Does the API run SELECT statements in Custom Logic?
entry.content:
I used the ‘Before Save’ logic to validate the Cost Center and Owner, but it always returns sy-subrc = 4.
I tried creating a record manually in the app generated from this Custom Business Object using the same input as the API payload, and it was created successfully.

Does a batch request execute faster than the SELECT statements, or is there something else causing this behavior?

entry.title: way to archive the company code after deactivation?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We are using sap public cloud 2sl system as we have deactivated the company code can we archive the company coe how can the process will be ...?

entry.title: RFM_ALLOCATION_STRATEGY BAdI in s4hana public cloud
entry.content:
I want to create RFM_ALLOCATION_STRATEGY BAdI via custom logic app in s4hana public cloud.

But I can't find that BAdI in custom logic. Why? Is there any configuration setting I need to activate?

Best Regards,

Khaing ZIn

entry.title: How to remove batch management from product master in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear all,

my users made a mistake and created batches for several products, now there is stock, material movements, purchase orders and production orders for these materials and batches become relevant without need.

That is why we want to delete the batch information again.

The batch management setting can not be reversed anymore for the affected products, but creating new products is no option due to released and approved drawings with these product numbers.

In S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition there is no SE16N that could help us with this. What is the way in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to reverse this setting ?

Thank you.

Best Regards,

Dirk

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud Adobe Forms: How to Control Line Item Layout Using a Header Flag?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on an SAP Adobe Form in S/4HANA Public Cloud. A custom header-level flag field is sent from ABAP and correctly bound to a header field, and the value prints correctly in the PDF output. This flag is used in JavaScript (calculate event) on a repeating line-item subform to control line-item layout behaviour such as visibility or page breaks, based on the current line-item index. The script is placed on a subform.

The logic works correctly in Adobe LiveCycle Designer (ADLC) preview, but after uploading the form and executing it in SAP runtime via transaction code, the conditions do not work. The flag value is available and prints correctly, no JavaScript errors occur, but the line-item layout changes are ignored.

What is the correct SAP-supported way to control line-item layout based on a header-level flag in Adobe Forms in S/4HANA Public Cloud?

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Missing Credit Memo to Add Journal Entry Item in Dispute Case
entry.content:
Cannot add credit memo to the dispute case.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: email setting for billing form
entry.content:
Hi, In my current project am struck in setting emails in OPD. Requirement is if i_customer-Taxnumber4 = 0., then we should send email the billing form to customer, otherwise no need to send them email. How to achieve this in Public cloud?

I was going through one document, came across below C_BILLINGDOCUMENTOMPARAMDET

which is not released in public cloud. Any inputs on how can we add this condition in OPD or if we have any other way around to achieve this?

Thanks.

Regards,

JP

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales

entry.title: CDs view for the HSN number
entry.content:

Based upon client requirement we are building custom report where we required CDS view to fetch data of the HSN Number.

 

Please let us know CDs view to fetch HSN number data


Thanks

entry.title: Credit Memo Request to correct Debit Memo
entry.content:
We are using Debit Memo Request DR with subsequent Debit Memo L2. We now want to raise a credit note against the L2 Debit Memo/Invoice issues to customer. But there is no Credit Memo Request available, which allows to reference the L2 Document. 

How to resolve this problem?

Best Regards 

Johannes
